title: Scripts Overview
content_html:
Scripts Overview

Use this command prefix for all script commands:

./

All commands below assume you are in dotlineform-site/.

For local environment/bootstrap steps, see Local Setup.

Purpose

This page is now the high-level entry point for repo scripts. Command-level usage, flags, output paths, and operational notes now live in the child docs below.

Common Runtime Assumptions

  • run project commands from dotlineform-site/
  • use project-local script paths such as ./scripts/...
  • docs-data rebuild command:
./scripts/build_docs_data.rb --write
  • if jekyll serve or bin/dev-studio is already running, verify one-off builds to /tmp/dlf-jekyll-build rather than _site/
  • media and generation scripts expect:
    • DOTLINEFORM_PROJECTS_BASE_DIR
    • DOTLINEFORM_MEDIA_BASE_DIR
  • shared pipeline defaults live in _data/pipeline.json

Script References

  • Docs Viewer Builder Build scope-owned docs JSON for Studio and Library docs.
  • Main Draft Pipeline Run the copy -> srcset -> generation pipeline from one entrypoint.
  • Copy Draft Media Stage source media for works, work details, and moments from workbook-driven IDs.
  • Srcset Builder Build srcset derivatives through the stable shell entrypoint and shared Python implementation.
  • Generate Work Pages Generate collection stubs, per-record JSON, aggregate indexes, and the catalogue search artifact.
  • Delete Work Remove one work from generated artifacts when workbook status is delete.
  • Tag Write Server Run the local Studio tag-save/import service with explicit write allowlists.
  • CSS Token Audit Audit typography and color literals across CSS files.
  • Site Consistency Audit Run read-only structural and contract checks across generated pages, JSON, and media.
  • Legacy Title Sort Fix Backfill legacy _works front matter that still depends on numeric title_sort.

Related References

  • Sorting Architecture
  • CSS Audit Spec
  • CSS Audit Latest
